actions.name: CHAT_WITH_ATTACHMENTS
actions.description: Legacy Discord attachment summarization for explicitly selected attachment IDs. Prefer READ_ATTACHMENT for normal current or recent files, images, media, links, and documents.

actions.name: DOWNLOAD_MEDIA
actions.description: Download a Discord media attachment or media URL for later inspection or processing.
actions.descriptionCompressed: Download Discord media attachment or URL.

actions.name: JOIN_CHANNEL
actions.description: Join a Discord voice channel when the user asks the agent to enter voice chat.

actions.name: LEAVE_CHANNEL
actions.description: Leave the current Discord voice channel.

actions.name: LIST_CHANNELS
actions.description: List Discord channels the bot can see in the current server.

actions.name: READ_CHANNEL
actions.description: Read or summarize recent messages from the current or specified Discord text channel. Use this for requests like 'last 100 messages', 'recent chat', or 'summarize this channel'.
actions.descriptionCompressed: Read or summarize recent Discord channel messages.

actions.name: SEND_DM
actions.description: Send a direct message to a Discord user only when the user explicitly asks for a DM to be sent.

actions.name: SEND_MESSAGE
actions.description: Send a message to a Discord channel only when the user explicitly asks for a channel message to be posted.

actions.name: SUMMARIZE_CONVERSATION
actions.description: Summarize a date or time range from the stored Discord conversation history. For recent channel-message requests such as 'summarize last 100 messages', use READ_CHANNEL instead.

actions.name: TRANSCRIBE_MEDIA
actions.description: Transcribe an audio or video attachment from Discord.

actions.name: SEARCH_MESSAGES
actions.description: Search Discord message history for terms, users, or topics.

actions.name: CREATE_POLL
actions.description: Create a Discord poll when the user asks for a poll or vote.

actions.name: GET_USER_INFO
actions.description: Get Discord profile or server-member information for a user.

actions.name: REACT_TO_MESSAGE
actions.description: Add an emoji reaction to a Discord message when the user asks for a reaction.

actions.name: PIN_MESSAGE
actions.description: Pin a Discord message when the user explicitly asks for a message to be pinned.

actions.name: UNPIN_MESSAGE
actions.description: Unpin a Discord message when the user explicitly asks for a message to be unpinned.

actions.name: SERVER_INFO
actions.description: Get information about the current Discord server, including channels, roles, and member counts.

actions.name: EDIT_MESSAGE
actions.description: Edit one of the bot's Discord messages when the user explicitly asks for an edit.

actions.name: DELETE_MESSAGE
actions.description: Delete one of the bot's Discord messages when the user explicitly asks for deletion.

actions.name: SETUP_CREDENTIALS
actions.description: Start Discord credential setup or account pairing when the user requests setup.
